characters.name: Bag Lady
characters.description: Bag LadyFirst AppearanceMother RedcapStatusDeadOccupationProstitute (Formerly)Main ActorHilary Sesta (Old)Other Actor(s)Scarlett O'Neal (Young)The Bag Lady when younger, working at Mother Redcap. "My finger's caught." The Bag Lady was a former prostitute who worked at The Mother Redcap pub under the ownerWilliam Ambergast. She used to sleep with clients whose wives had found out about their cheating ways and had paid to have them executed by Ambergast fully aware of the morally questionable circumstances.

characters.name: Francesca Boutron
characters.description: Francesca BoutronFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombStatusAlive (Arrested)OccupationSupermodelMain ActorSaskia Mulder Francesca Boutron was an international supermodel who posed for the artistHedley. She attempted to start a relationship with him, but he rejected her in favour of another of his models,Katrina Toplis. Enraged, she hatched a plot to kill him and make her more well-known for being present at the scene of the crime, allowing her to sell her story. She practised firing a gun with her feet while wearing tape over her eyes, using Shale's portrait of her as a target. She then snuck into Shale's house, threw jewellery out of the window to fake a robbery and tied herself up. She shot Shale with her feet as he entered his bedroom, then she dropped the gun on the floor and slipped off the elastic band that held it to her feet. She was found, and told the police that she was Shale's lover and she was tied up by the intruder.

characters.name: Francesca Boutron

characters.name: Serena Shale
characters.description: Serena ShaleFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombStatusAliveOccupationChief Magazine EditorFamilyHedley Shale (Husband) †Main ActorSheila Gish "10 out of 10 for technique, you can come work for me any day." Serena Shalewas the wife of the artistHedley Shaleand chief editor for Eve magazine. She attended an art show of his, where she grew annoyed that he was flirting with one of his models,Francesca Boutron. The next morning, she discussed with Hedley his newest artwork and upon discovering that the model was merely from a photograph, claimed that he was losing his touch. She went to work and retreated to her office, untilJoy, her P.A, puts through a call to ask for some pictures for a client back. Joy enters the office, sees Serena with her back to her, legs propped up and smoking, and promises not to disturb her again.

characters.name: Burly Man
characters.description: Burly ManFirst AppearanceMother RedcapStatusAliveOccupationPlain Clothes Police OfficerMain ActorJan Linnik "Jonathan Creek?" The Burly Man was a plain clothes police officer sent by Chief InpectorKen Speed, to collectJonathanfromMaddy'shome in order to aide in the murder ofJudge Forrest Sweetland. However, he was under the assumption that Jonathan was wanted as a criminal due to his bosses orders. So after Jonathan confirms his name to the Burly Man, he is dragged out of the house without being able to say goodbye to Maddy.

characters.name: Clifford Jennings
characters.description: Clifford JenningsFirst AppearanceMother RedcapStatusDead (Murdered)OccupationClothing Firm ManagerMain ActorDavid McKail "Death certificate said it was heart. Truth was; no one knows what killed him."-Jason Tippet Clifford Jennings was a manager of a clothing firm who visited the Mother Redcap pub in Edmonton, North London in an effort to sleep with aprostitute. While he was in the bedroom, preparing for intercourse, he went over to look out of the window, where it was believed he saw something saw terrifying, it literally scared him to death.

Detective Sergeant Owen Davey was put in charge of investigating the death ofHedley Shale.

Dr. Laura Climpson was a pathologist who worked on the case of the murder ofJudge Forrest Sweetland.

You murdering, twisted, evil...!" Gwynneth Sweetland was the wife of High CourtJudge Forrest Sweetland.

characters.name: Ingrid Strange
characters.description: Ingrid StrangeFirst AppearanceThe House of MonkeysStatusAliveOccupationGPFamilyElliot Strange(Husband) †Jordan Strange(Son)Cathy Strange(Daughter-In-Law)Main ActorAnnette Crosbie Jordan Strange(Son) Cathy Strange(Daughter-In-Law) Ingrid was an incredibly friendly, devoted and loving wife, mother and friend. She cared deeply about the people in her life and treated them with warmth and hospitality. Despite the friendliness, she could show moments of anger, sadness or more often - sarcasm. Even in moments of family crisis, she took a pragmatic stance on any situation and tried to be as fair as possible when it came to addressing parties who had something to apologise for. She was highly intelligent both medically and socially, and also carried arising issues with both wit and humour. She was able to completely follow Jonathan's explanation as to how he hypothesised Elliot's murder, showing her key intellect and rationale. She was also highly skilled in observation of animal behaviour, whether it be human or monkey.

characters.name: Jason Tippet
characters.description: Jason TippetFirst AppearanceMother RedcapStatusAliveOccupationEstate AgentMain ActorMarcus Gilbert "If you have any kind of problem with a man who practices nudism, now would be the time to say." Jason was an estate agent who was looking into the history of the Mother Redcap pub, a building which was on his list of properties. He had heard rumours of its grisly past and sought the help ofMaddyto do some investigation into the matter. He wrote to her to give details about the case, but after she discovered he was an estate agent, Maddy switched off and abandoned the letter. Jason planned to ring her at home on the Monday evening, and despite her attempts to turn on her answering machine,Jonathananswers his call and passes the phone over to Maddy, despite her ire.

characters.name: Jonathan Creek
characters.description: Jonathan CreekFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombLast AppearanceDaemons' RoostDuration1997-2016StatusAliveMain ActorAlan DaviesJonathan Creekis an extremely intelligent man who can wrap his mind around problems, and solve them in a few hours. As such he has found an ideal profession, designing illusions for magician Adam Klaus. And he comes in most useful when playing logic games. Although Jonathan is a fairly quiet man, he will voice his opinion and won't be taken for granted by anyone. Although he will listen to people he will quickly dismiss ideas which he knows to be wrong. Thus to some people he can seem like "he's always right". As such he is open to people who want to take him down a peg or two, especially Maddy. He is therefore always on his toes and won't let the wool be pulled over his eyes easily. Jonathan leads a fairly orderly life, and at first didn't like Maddy bringing chaos into his neat little world. He even voiced his opinion on the fact. However it would seem that a gap in his life has now been filled, and he has started to enjoy himself solving crimes. He has a hobby as it were, which he can pursue in his off hours. We can also see Jonathan take credit for the things he does. Something which he would appear to like, as Adam takes most of the credit for his illusions. Although having said that Jonathan does not crave the limelight, and is thus happy to take a back seat to Maddy, who takes the main credit, but does at least mention Jonathan in her work.

characters.name: Joy
characters.description: "Hello Danni.. DeVito...Davina! Have you done much professional modelling may I ask?" JoyFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombStatusAliveOccupationPersonal AssistantMain ActorRebecca CharlesJoy was the Personal Assistant toSerena Shaleat Eve Magazine. She had a kindly demamour and would try to satisfy her boss to the best of her abilities. When Serena first walks into the office after leaving home, Joy casually greets her before Serena enters her personal office and Joy then sits at her desk, receiving an immediate phone call from a client named Davina Yates, who wishes to have her pictures back. Serena allows her into the office, where Joy quickly runs in and retrieves the pictures from the filing cabinet, before returning to her desk. She immediately forgets Davina's name, mistaking her for Danny DeVito; most likely because of the look of her pictures.

characters.name: Judge Forrest Sweetland
characters.description: Judge Forrest SweetlandFirst AppearanceMother RedcapStatusDead (Murdered)OccupationJudgeFamilyGwynneth Sweetland(Wife)Main ActorLeonard Kavanagh "My wife and I are rather hoping to have an early night; I have to be up at six on the dot tomorrow." Forrest Sweetland was a high court judge who was being targeted by a gang of Chinese hitmen after incarcerating some oftheir members for murder and extortion charges.

characters.name: Katrina Toplis
characters.description: Katrina ToplisFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombStatusAliveOccupationCleanerFamilyMartin Toplis (Husband)Main ActorJane Hazlegrove"Sex was just a small part of what we had. I never met a man like him. He had so many great qualities - monogamy wasn't one of them."  Katrina was the cleaner forHedleyandSerena Shaleat their home 'The Wrestler's Tomb'. Unbeknownst to Serena, she was having an affair with Hedley behind her back. As she is making her way into their home to visit Hedley, she steps on a letter addressed to him, then hears gunshots upstairs,and having rushing to investigate the sound, she is the first to discover Hedley's lifeless body and seesFrancescabound and gagged with tape on the floor.

Expecting her first baby in a month courtesy of the local sperm bank. What are they gonna put on the birth certificate? 'Father: some wanker.' "

characters.name: Madeline Magellan
characters.description: Maddy MagellanFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombLast AppearanceThe Three GamblersDuration1997-2000StatusAliveOccupationInvestigative Journalist"True Crime" AuthorMain ActorCaroline QuentinMadeline 'Maddy' Magellanwas an investigative journalist and true-crime author, who ended up becoming friends with Jonathan Creek, encouraging him to use his powers of deduction to investigate the strangest crimes. "True Crime" Author  She's the kind of woman who won't take any crap from anyone. She's a damn good freelance investigative journalist, who sadly isn't appreciated by the publishing world. She has a unique ability to talk her way into places and situations which will lead her to a story. Unfortunately this can also lead her into trouble, which she gets into often. She is a very dominant person, who likes to be in control and won't relinquish the upper hand easily. Maddy is a spontaneous woman, who tends to do first, think later. Many of her crackpot schemes fall flat on their faces, but that doesn't seem to stop her trying. Maddy is a headstrong woman, who once she has her mind set on something, she won't let go until she has an answer. Maddy is quick to anger, but also quick to change her mind. She can have violent mood swings, but then seconds later be all sweetness and light. This can make her either extremely colourful or extremely annoying, depending on your point of view. Maddy has little patience. She hates waiting for things to follow their natural course and will do things in order to hurry up the process. This is something she tried to do with her relationship with Jonathan. She tried to speed up the relationship by trying to make Jonathan jealous. She has little time for those who have an air of superiority about them. Although having said that she will invest time in trying to bring them down a peg or two. The nature of her profession means that Maddy is a people person. It also means she is adaptable, and a quick thinker. However some of her ideas can be questionable. Maddy's little patience also means she is quick to judge a situation, sometimes completely getting the wrong idea. She will pass sentence on a situation which she has no business doing as she has no real claim to it. For example who Jonathan is sleeping with, even though she isn't his girlfriend!

characters.name: Mr Winstanley
characters.description: Mr WinstanleyFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombStatusAliveMain ActorAlan Thompson "Doesn't he ever give you a day off from that vacuum cleaner?" Mr Winstanley was a neighbour and friend ofKatrina Toplis.

characters.name: Mr Winstanley

characters.name: Rhino
characters.description: RhinoFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombStatusAliveOccupationBodyguardMain ActorScott Chisholm "Ten minutes outside and we could make him forget everything he saw!" Rhino was a bodyguard forAdam Klausduring his show. Despite being good at his job and serving the needs of Adam, he was unaware thatJonathanwas his employee, so when he and his other henchman Herbie found him backstage, they immediately grabbed hold of him and carried him to Adam's dressing room to let him know.

characters.name: Hedley Shale
characters.description: "I just want you to get round here and make me bark like a sea lion!"Hedley ShaleFirst AppearanceThe Wrestler's TombStatusDead (Murdered)OccupationPainterFamilySerena Shale (Wife)Main ActorColin Baker Hedley Shalewas an artist who painted naked portraits of women. Much to the chagrin of his wifeSerena, he engaged in affairs with his models - one of which was his cleaner;Katrina Toplis. Another of his models,Francesca Boutron, attempted to engage in an affair with him but he rejected her, preferring the natural beauty of Katrina. One morning after his wife had gone to work, he called Katrina to come round. However, he went to his bedroom to find Francesca there, bound and gagged. She had a revolver held in her feet, and she shot him, enraged that he had spurned her. She dropped the gun, and having bound and gagged herself, was not suspected in the crime.

characters.name: Shirley Priest
characters.description: Shirley PriestFirst AppearanceGhost's ForgeDuration1999StatusAliveFamilyRobin Priest(husband, illegal)Main ActorSara Stephens Shirley Priest(real surname unknown)was a woman who was groomed and abused by herUncle, from a very young age. By the time she was in her thirties, Bill and she made a habit of burgling the houses of wealthy people. In 1998, the two of them burgled the house ofEzra Carr, however, Shirley, made sure that Bill was caught, and a fight broke out between Carr and Bill, leaving Carr knocked unconscious. Shirley, however, ended up killing Bill and making Carr thinking he'd done it, as he had contracted amnesia. She also gave Carr a new identity, that of Robin Priest, and claimed that she was his wife.
